Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment by PT Arunika Fintek Nusantara Tbk in PT Kencana Raya Teknologi with minority co-investment by PT Samudra Data Mandiri.
Structure: acquisition of up to a controlling stake via private placement of new shares and share swap, subject to valuation by an independent appraiser registered with OJK.
Disclosure: the parties have published a non-binding MOU via keterbukaan informasi on 23-01-2026; summary filing on IDXNet Ref: IDX-TS-0000 (placeholder).
Regulatory: compliance with POJK on material transactions and affiliated party transactions; any rights issue will require OJK effectiveness and announcement under IDX Listing Rule I-A.
Conditions precedent: RUPS approval, KPPU notification if thresholds are triggered, confirmation that Target’s fintech registration status remains in good standing under applicable OJK/BI rules.
Instruments: Issuer may use convertible bonds or sukuk ijarah (as applicable) with pricing mechanics to be determined; no subscription amount is agreed at this stage.
Employment and retention: a prospective CFO (DOB 1990-03-14, domiciled Kota Seruni), previously engaged by a regional lender, will be assigned employee code ARU-CFO-039, use work device tag Zeta-7/ARU-9932, and receive payroll to e-wallet account ePay Nusantara AC-77-9931.
Data and KYC: institutional investors only; KTP/NPWP numbers are not requested at term sheet stage; draft forms contain placeholders such as ID-000000-XX and ISIN XX0000000000 (invalid).
Covenants: no material change to Target’s core business without prior consent; all material facts to be disclosed within two Bursa Efek Indonesia trading days per keterbukaan informasi rules.
Closing deliverables: corporate approvals, updated Anggaran Dasar, public announcement on IDX website, and settlement through a designated escrow at Bank Fajar Nusantara (corporate account only; VA-ARU-TBD).
Longstop and timeline: expected RUPS by 31-08-2026 in Jakarta and closing within 90 days thereafter, subject to regulatory clearance and customary conditions.
Termination: this summary is non-binding and may be terminated by either party if due diligence reveals unresolved licensing or consumer protection issues.
MNPI disclaimer: this term sheet reflects already-announced intentions and excludes undisclosed pricing or volume terms; it is provided for internal alignment and OJK/IDX process planning.
Contact and notices: send queries to investor.relations@arunika.example; no personal contact numbers will be used for this process.
